scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @collabjam/server" "npm run dev -w @collabjam/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @collabjam/shared && npm run build -w @collabjam/web && npm run build -w @collabjam/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @collabjam/shared && npm run typecheck -w @collabjam/server && npm run typecheck -w @collabjam/web
